response.justification: Candidate is a strong full-stack/web engineer but lacks the core requirements for this embedded security role: no native Japanese proficiency, no demonstrated C-for-UNIX embedded firmware experience, no Linux kernel modification work, and no exposure to LAN-switch security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, NETCONF, SNMP) or chip-vendor SDKs. The brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments is over a decade old and unrelated to embedded networking security.
strengths: 10+ years of professional software development experience
Some historical C/C++ exposure at National Instruments
Strong testing and software craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD)
concerns: No native Japanese language proficiency listed (only English/Romanian fluent, basic German)
No embedded firmware, Linux kernel modification, or LAN-switch/security protocol experience
Career trajectory is web/full-stack (TypeScript, Node, D, React) — far from C-based embedded networking

key_factors.factor: No embedded C / Linux kernel / switch security background
General software engineering seniority and breadth
